full_prompt: Design one representative 15 m clear-span simple-supported glulam-timber pedestrian footbridge compliant with the EWB-UK Technical Handbook (2022) and aligned to Eurocode 5 (EN 1995-1-1) and Eurocode 1 load codes for a low-resource rural setting. The bridge has two parallel GL28h glulam timber main beams (h = 600 mm, b = 200 mm), 15 m long, simply supported on concrete abutments, with a 1.2 m clear walkway of 50 mm thick cross-timber decking on top. Design pedestrian live load is 5.0 kN/m2 uniformly distributed per EN 1991-2 (footbridges), design wind pressure is 1.0 kN/m2 per simplified EN 1991-1-4 (exposure corresponding to rural inland, force coefficient 1.3 on solid envelope), plus self-weight. Design safety factors on material strength per Eurocode 5: gamma_M,glulam = 1.25, k_mod for medium-term load = 0.8, so design bending strength f_m,d = k_mod * f_m,k / gamma_M = 0.8 * 28.0 / 1.25 = 17.9 MPa for GL28h. Deflection limit L/300 = 15000/300 = 50 mm under live load (EN 1995-1-1 serviceability). The bridge includes a 1100 mm tall timber handrail on both sides (EN 1991-1-7 horizontal line load 1.0 kN/m on top rail). Deliverable is a CAD assembly of the glulam beams, deck, handrails, and abutment bearings, suitable for linear static structural FEA per three Eurocode-aligned load combinations: LC1 pedestrian UDL + dead, LC2 wind + dead, LC3 pedestrian + wind + dead (accompanying combination). Vibration (EN 1995-2 Annex B), thermal, fluid, radiation, buckling analyses are NOT required in this baseline sample but lateral-torsional buckling of glulam beams is envelope-checked by Eurocode hand calc.
short_prompt:
Design a 15 m simple-span glulam-timber pedestrian footbridge with two GL28h main beams (200 x 600 mm), a 50 mm C24 cross-timber deck, and timber handrails on both sides, supported on concrete abutments, per the EWB-UK Technical Handbook (2022) aligned to Eurocode 5 (EN 1995-1-1) and Eurocode 1. Eurocode-5 partial factors: gamma_M = 1.25 for glulam, k_mod = 0.8 (medium-term), giving design bending strength fm,d = 17.9 MPa for GL28h. SLS deflection limit L/300 under live. Walkway 1.2 m clear, handrail 1.1 m tall.

Load cases.
- LC1 pedestrian UDL: 5.0 kN/m^2 on the deck per EN 1991-2 (footbridges).
- LC2 wind: 1.0 kN/m^2 lateral per simplified EN 1991-1-4 for rural inland exposure.
- LC3 dead + handrail: self-weight plus 1.0 kN/m horizontal handrail line load per EN 1991-1-7.

prompt.title: 15 m EWB-UK glulam footbridge to Eurocode 5
prompt.brief: Design a 15 m glulam footbridge with GL28h beams 600 x 200 mm carrying 5 kPa pedestrian + 1 kPa wind with Eurocode 5 partial factors.

boundary_conditions.supports: pinned + roller simple supports at abutments

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: EN 1995-2 Annex B pedestrian comfort check is out of scope for this sample.
exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis: LTB envelope-checked by Eurocode hand calc.

out_of_scope_but_real_world_needed: Durability class of glulam for exposed outdoor use
